texto: Obedience makes our heart receptive to what God has already done. It doesn’t move Him; His heart is always aflame toward us. Generally, this revelation is not taught correctly by well-meaning ministers. The incorrect way that obedience is taught causes people to be overly-introspective, obsessing over their inadequacies and failures. It breeds SELF-ESTEEM issues instead of promoting CHRIST-ESTEEM wholeness. It breeds a destructive DEMAND-CONSCIOUSNESS (law) instead of a liberating SUPPLY-CONSCIOUSNESS (grace).
explicacao: Citação de Brian Williams sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “Obedience makes our heart receptive to what God has already done. It doesn’t move Him; His heart …” articula reflexao, grace, obedience em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
